title: Pakkam Vandhu Lyrics Kaththi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Pakkam Vandhu
Singer: Anirudh, Hip Hop Tamizhan
Music: Anirudh
Movie: Kaththi

you know what
guess this back
we are back baby

ah penne paar
ah oru muttam thaali
ah en pakkam vaa
ah enai anaithida vaa
ah penne ottrai muththam podhumaa
illai latcham muththam vendumaa
adi ennavendru solluma

en nenjam thudikkudhu
unnai nenaithida
kaigal pidiththida
manasadhu thudikkudhu
unmai thaan
paithiyam pidikkudhu
vaithiyam paarthidu
ennai nee konjam thottu paar

penne endhan ulagam neethaan
naan andha nilavai suttrivaravaa
unnai ..
muththam ondrai thandhu vittaal
mukthi adaivaai

vinmeen thaan adhu
kaadhal thaan kondadhu pole
naan unmeedhu kondidavaa
unnai muththangal ittu
pin vetkathil vittuthaan
manjathil konjithaan vendridavaa

unnai paarthaale podhumey
aayiram jenmangal meendum
pirandhonnai serndhiduven

ennai paakkaamal pogaadhey
nenjamthaan thaangaadhey
ullangayil unnai thaangiduven

DANCE..
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
Pakkaam vandhu konjam
muththangal thaa

penne endhan kannai paar
ulle latcham vennila
undhan kangal ennai kandhadhum
latchangal kodiyaai marudhammaa
adi ponadhu pogattum
kaayangal aarattum
eppodhum naan unnai kanavil pakka
aasaigal vandhidum aanandham thandhidum
indru mudhal indha paattai nee ketka

mugaththil irukku sirippu
aana ullukkul edhukku morappu
adi agaththin azhagu mugaththil theriyum
idhuthaan ennoda karuththu

enthaan neeyum paarkka
aasaigal vandhu ennai thaakka
meendum naan unnaye paakka
kadhal vandhu nenjam malarndhadhey
ulagam marandhadhye
ah unnaal pudhidhaai pirandhadhey
adi yen ippadi nigalndhadhu
iru uyir ondraai kalandhadhu

adiye ippo yen sirithaai
idhayam sattena nee pariththaai
unmai mattum endhan nenjam
ninaithidudhey

Maname maname oru
ponna thaedi naan tholanjen
maname  maname
unna kaadhalaala naan karanjen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pakkam Vandhu?

Pakkam Vandhu conveys themes of love and excitement, celebrating the joy of being together.

What is the context of this song in the movie Kaththi?

The song is featured during a lively sequence that showcases the protagonist's vibrant personality and his interactions with others.

Who are the singers of Pakkam Vandhu?

The song is sung by Anirudh and Hip Hop Tamizha, both of whom bring their unique styles to the track.

When was Pakkam Vandhu released?

The song was released on September 17, 2014, as part of the Kaththi soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pakkam Vandhu, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous moments shared between characters in Kaththi. The upbeat rhythm and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The collaboration between Anirudh and Hip Hop Tamizha adds a unique flair, enhancing the overall excitement of the track. This song beautifully encapsulates the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pakkam Vandhu from Kaththi is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and energy. With Anirudh's electrifying beats and Hip Hop Tamizha's dynamic vocals, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious rhythm that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: You know what? Guess who's back? We are back, baby.
Hey girl, look, just a kiss is enough. Come to me, come and embrace me. Is one kiss enough, or do you want more? Tell me what you want.
My heart beats thinking of you. My hands want to hold you. My mind is crazy for you. Look at me, just touch me a little.
Girl, you are my world. Will you revolve around me? If you give me a kiss, it will be liberation.
It’s like love is a heavenly thing. I will take you in my arms. I will give you kisses and then leave you behind, just a little bit.
Just seeing you is enough; I will be reborn a thousand times with you.
Don't go without looking at me; my heart can't bear it. I will hold you in my heart.
Come close and give me some kisses.
DANCE.. Come close and give me some kisses (3)
Girl, look into my eyes. The moon is in your eyes. When you see me, it’s like a treasure. Even if it goes away, I will always keep you in my dreams, bringing joy. Today, listen to this song.
There’s a smile on your face, but why the sadness inside? The beauty of your heart shows on your face; this is my thought.
You too have hopes of seeing me. Love has bloomed in my heart, forgetting the world. You were born to be special; why are you like this? You and I are one soul combined.
Why are you smiling now? My heart is in pain because of you. Only the truth is what my heart thinks about.
Oh my heart, I’m searching for a girl, and I will find her. Oh my heart, I will win you over with love.
Come close and give me some kisses. Come close and give me some kisses. Come close and give me some kisses.
Oh my heart, I’m searching for a girl, and I will find her. Oh my heart, I will win you over with love.
